seo.title: Memberships | {{siteName}} - Zanahoria, Bronze, Silver, Gold & Diamond
seo.description: Discover the membership tiers of the {{siteName}} private club. From Zanahoria (free) to Diamond with exclusive discounts, free deliveries, gift samples, and access to premium benefits. Join the most complete green magic club in Colombia.
seo.keywords: private club membership, {{siteName}} membership tiers, exclusive discounts, premium benefits, Zanahoria membership, Bronze membership, Silver membership, Gold membership, Diamond membership, club subscription, {{siteName}} memberships
seo.schemaDescription: Membership system of the {{siteName}} private club with 6 tiers and exclusive benefits.
